_comment: Phase 19 — Due Diligence Module. Required documents per payment type for Polish WHT remitters. Legal basis: Art. 26 Polish CIT Act; MF Objaśnienia podatkowe z 3 lipca 2025 r. §4.

required_docs.name: Certificate of tax residence
required_docs.description: Official tax residence certificate issued by the recipient country's tax authority, confirming the entity is a tax resident in that jurisdiction (Art. 26 §1 CIT).

required_docs.name: Beneficial owner declaration
required_docs.description: Signed declaration by the recipient entity's authorised representative confirming it is the beneficial owner of the dividend income (Art. 26 §1 CIT).

required_docs.name: Corporate ownership structure chart
required_docs.description: Chart showing the full ownership chain from ultimate beneficial owner through to the Polish paying company, confirming the shareholding position.

required_docs.name: Board meeting minutes (dividend decision)
required_docs.description: Minutes of the board meeting at which the dividend distribution was approved by the recipient entity's own management, demonstrating independent decision-making capacity (MF Objaśnienia §2.3.1).

required_docs.name: Audited annual financial statements (last 2 years)
required_docs.description: Audited financial statements for the two most recent fiscal years evidencing real economic activity and own assets.

required_docs.name: Current shareholders register
required_docs.description: Official register of shareholders confirming the ownership structure stated in the corporate structure chart.

required_docs.name: Certificate of tax residence
required_docs.description: Official tax residence certificate issued by the recipient country's tax authority.

required_docs.name: Beneficial owner declaration
required_docs.description: Signed BO declaration by the recipient confirming it receives interest for its own economic benefit (Art. 26 §1 CIT).

required_docs.name: Signed loan agreement
required_docs.description: The underlying loan or credit facility agreement under which the interest is paid, including interest rate terms and maturity.

required_docs.name: Board meeting minutes (loan approval)
required_docs.description: Minutes of the board meeting approving the granting of the loan, demonstrating the recipient entity makes independent financing decisions (MF Objaśnienia §2.3.1).

required_docs.name: Audited annual financial statements (last 2 years)
required_docs.description: Financial statements for the two most recent fiscal years evidencing real economic activity and own capital.

required_docs.name: KSeF invoice identifier
required_docs.description: National e-Invoicing System (KSeF) reference number for the invoice documenting the interest payment, required for domestic transactions (Art. 106na Ustawa o VAT).

required_docs.name: Certificate of tax residence
required_docs.description: Official tax residence certificate issued by the recipient country's tax authority.

required_docs.name: Beneficial owner declaration
required_docs.description: Signed BO declaration confirming the recipient owns the IP economically and receives royalties for its own benefit.

required_docs.name: Signed IP license agreement
required_docs.description: The license agreement granting the Polish payer the right to use the intellectual property, including scope, territory, and royalty rate.

required_docs.name: IP ownership documentation
required_docs.description: Patent registration certificates, copyright assignments, trademark registrations, or equivalent records confirming the recipient holds legal title to the intangible.

required_docs.name: Payroll records for IP development staff
required_docs.description: Payroll reports or employment contracts evidencing that the recipient employs staff who perform DEMPE functions (Development, Enhancement, Maintenance, Protection, Exploitation) for the IP (OECD BEPS Actions 8–10).

required_docs.name: R&D expenditure records
required_docs.description: Records of research and development expenditure supporting the DEMPE analysis — e.g. cost centre reports, project invoices, capitalisation schedules.

required_docs.name: Board meeting minutes (IP strategy and licensing decisions)
required_docs.description: Minutes demonstrating the recipient entity's board makes independent decisions on IP development strategy and licensing terms (MF Objaśnienia §2.3.1).

required_docs.name: KSeF invoice identifier
required_docs.description: National e-Invoicing System (KSeF) reference number for the royalty invoice.
